title: SkuSeller
description: Object containing related SKU sellers data.

SellerId.description: SKU seller ID. This is the ID that identifies the seller in the marketplace. It can be the same as the seller name or a unique number. Check the **Sellers management** section in the Admin to get the correct ID.

SellerStockKeepingUnitId.description: SKU ID for the SKU seller.

IsActive.description: Defines if the SKU is active.

FreightCommissionPercentage.description: Registered value for Seller Freight Commission.

ProductCommissionPercentage.description: Registered value for Seller product Commission.
